allow: Bash(python -c "import rasterizer; print\([m.name for m in rasterizer.FillMode]\)")

Bash(python render.py ./Cases/Default.json > /tmp/run.log 2>&1; echo "exit=$?"; echo "--- Error: count ---"; grep -c "^Error:" Cases/output.log 2>/dev/null; echo "--- tail run.log ---"; tail -6 /tmp/run.log)
Bash(sed -n '/Pipeline Statistics vs Golden/,/extra \(ours not in golden\)/p' Cases/ev371.log)
Bash(cd /c/Development/Graphics/hlsl_interpreter && grep -i "Output-Merger write clamp" Cases/regression_logs/*event371*.log Cases/regression_logs/*event104*.log)

PowerShell($tmp = "C:\\Temp\\zc104"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $tmp | Out-Null; Add-Type -A System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::ExtractToDirectory\("C:\\Development\\Graphics\\hlsl_interpreter\\Cases\\Collision-fix-constant-buffer-and-RdotV-zero_event104.zip", $tmp\); $d = \(Get-ChildItem $tmp -Directory\)[0].FullName; "DIR=$d"; "==== pre_draw_depth_stencil.csv \(first 15 lines\) ===="; Get-Content "$d\\pre_draw_depth_stencil.csv" -TotalCount 15; "==== total lines ===="; \(Get-Content "$d\\pre_draw_depth_stencil.csv" | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)

PowerShell($d = "C:\\Temp\\zc104\\Collision-fix-constant-buffer-and-RdotV-zero_event104"; "==== distinct Depth values \(count\) ===="; Import-Csv "$d\\pre_draw_depth_stencil.csv" | Group-Object Depth | Select-Object Count,Name | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 10; "==== distinct Stencil ===="; Import-Csv "$d\\pre_draw_depth_stencil.csv" | Group-Object Stencil | Select-Object Count,Name -First 5; "==== max X,Y ===="; $rows = Import-Csv "$d\\pre_draw_depth_stencil.csv"; "maxX=" + \(\($rows | Measure-Object -Property X -Maximum\).Maximum\); "maxY=" + \(\($rows | Measure-Object -Property Y -Maximum\).Maximum\))

PowerShell($d = "C:\\Temp\\zc104\\Collision-fix-constant-buffer-and-RdotV-zero_event104"; Get-Content "$d\\pipeline_state.csv" | Select-String -Pattern "^DepthStencil|^OM|DepthEnable|DepthWrite|DepthFunc|StencilEnable|StencilRef|OMDepth"; "==== ALL categories ===="; Get-Content "$d\\pipeline_state.csv" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split ","\)[0] } | Group-Object | Select-Object Name,Count)

PowerShell($d = "C:\\Temp\\zc104\\Collision-fix-constant-buffer-and-RdotV-zero_event104"; "==== pipeline_statistics.csv ===="; Get-Content "$d\\pipeline_state.csv" | Select-String "RenderTarget,Format"; Import-Csv "$d\\pipeline_statistics.csv" | Where-Object { $_.RawCounter -in @\('SamplesPassed','PSInvocations','RasterizedPrimitives','RasterizerInvocations'\) } | Format-Table RawCounter,Value -Auto; "==== current regression log: depth/SamplesPassed/PixelDiff summary ===="; $log = "C:\\Development\\Graphics\\hlsl_interpreter\\Cases\\regression_logs\\Collision-fix-constant-buffer-and-RdotV-zero_event104.log"; if \(Test-Path $log\) { Get-Content $log | Select-String "Rasterizer pixels|failed depth|SamplesPassed|Output-Merger Pixels vs Golden|Golden pixels:|Total PASSED" } else { "NO LOG YET" })
